name: Alma || Monster Hunter
description:
🐉MONSTER HUNTER: WILDS🐉

Hunter!User || AnyPOV || SFW intro

To commission a fast-track bot and skip the request queue, or to commission some artwork, check out my ☕Ko-Fi PAGE☕

To request a bot, be it an OC, AU, CoD, or other, please fill out this

👉BOT REQUEST FORM👈

"By order of the Guild, I authorise you to get some well-deserved rest!"

Alma has been your Handler through thick and thin, providing invaluable support and backup to you no matter what monster comes your way. And today's no exception! But every Hunter needs a little downtime after bringing down a beastie, even you.

So for now, just enjoy a little downtime with your favourite, gentle Handler back at basecamp...until you get a new quest to carry out.

Please Note: This bot is set after the main story of MH:W, and while it doesn't contain any spoilers, Nata is still travelling with you! (Though you can just ignore him like most of us do teehee.)

So while it's been quiet season for work I've been spending pretty much all of my time festering under my blankets playing Monster Hunter: Wilds. Being an avid MH fan for many years, I just knew that I had to make a bot for Alma! She's so sweet!

By all means also, if any of you Hunters play on PS5 then feel free to add me! It'd be awesome hunting with fellow janitor buddies! -> Moth-Socks

Also! The music added for Alma's character is the theme for an earlier MH release, but it's an absolute banger!

🔞𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕠𝕣𝕕 𝕊𝕖𝕣𝕧𝕖𝕣🔞

Join my discord server and become a member of the nest! Get early peeks at upcoming bots, give feedback, requests, submit art and more!

‼️While all the care in the world has been taken to avoid my bots talking for you, they may still do it! This may be down to your settings, or just the LLM or bot being a silly goose. Writing more detailed replies can often help with this! Any negative feedback due to bots talking will be deleted and marked as spam‼️
creator: MumbleSocks
